hook.command: git diff --cached | grep -iE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{30,}|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\s*=\s*["'\''"a-z]|password\s*=\s*["'\''"a-z])' && echo '❌ SECRETS DETECTED IN STAGED FILES' && exit 1 || true
grep -rlE '(reshevyas|rishivyas|mr\.rishi)' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '❌ PERSONAL IDENTITY DETECTED' && exit 1 || true
